The group arrives at the massive, emerald-studded gates of the Emerald City. They encounter the Guardian of the Gates, who presents the first obstacle to their entry.
Group arrives at the base of the massive gates, looking up in awe.
Group stands in apprehension before the Guardian's obstacle.
The group approaches the gate and encounters the Guardian.
